TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Giannis Antetokounmpo nalecuhan i Athens, Greece, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw(pahanhanan tu kawaw ťÄÄšľĎ) ayza. Giannis Antetokounmpo i 2013 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka cacay ku uwac atu silsil 15, namapili' tu nu Milwaukee Bucks putiput. 12 a bulad 6 a demiad, 1994 a mihcaan, Giannis Antetokounmpo, miunduay. NBA kanatal kanas-mali putiput, Amilika: National Basketball Association, sapuyu'en NBA, u Amis-Amilika tatama syubay kanas-mali putiput. izaw 30 a mali cebang, mikitinay tusa a subal, sawaliyan atu satipan. cacay subal izaw tulu a cu, cacay a cu izaw lima a cebang, cacay cebang namakay Canada, u zama sa namakay Amilika. kya madademec "Amilika syubay kanas-mali nisakaput sasasedsed, acasa "Amilika kanas nisakaput sasasedsed", sapuyu'en "Amilika syubay kanas", acasa kakelul han NBA.
S.PHON: giannis ant…ôtokounmpo nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i atńß…ôns, gr…ô…ô ¶…ô, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput, pańßanńßanan tu kawaw(pańßanńßanan tu kawaw **) ajza. giannis ant…ôtokounmpo i **** a mińß ¶aan nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka ¶a ¶aj ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ **, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu mir~…ĺwauk…ô…ô bu ¶ks putiput. ** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶aan, giannis ant…ôtokounmpo, miunduaj. nba kanatar~…ĺ kanas-mar~…ĺi putiput, amir~…ĺika: nationar~…ĺ bask…ôtbar~…ĺr~…ĺ asso ¶iation, sapuju Ē~ °…ôn nba, u amis-amir~…ĺika tatama sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi putiput. izaw ** a mar~…ĺi ¶…ôbaŇč, mikitinaj tusa a subar~…ĺ, sawar~…ĺijan atu satipan. ¶a ¶aj subar~…ĺ izaw tur~…ĺu a ¶u, ¶a ¶aj a ¶u izaw r~…ĺima a ¶…ôbaŇč, ¶a ¶aj ¶…ôbaŇč namakaj ¶anada, u zama sa namakaj amir~…ĺika. kja madad…ôm…ô ¶ "amir~…ĺika sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi nisakaput sasas…ôds…ôd, a ¶asa "amir~…ĺika kanas nisakaput sasas…ôds…ôd", sapuju Ē~ °…ôn "amir~…ĺika sjubaj kanas", a ¶asa kak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßan nba.
S.FORM: Giannis Antetokounmpo nalecuhan i Athens, Greece, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw(pahanhanan tu kawaw ťÄÄšľĎ) ayza. Giannis Antetokounmpo i 2013 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka cacay ku uwac atu silsil 15, namapili' tu nu Milwaukee Bucks putiput. 12 a bulad 6 a demiad, 1994 a mihcaan, Giannis Antetokounmpo, miunduay. NBA kanatal kanas-mali putiput, Amilika: National Basketball Association, sapuyu'en NBA, u Amis-Amilika tatama syubay kanas-mali putiput. izaw 30 a mali cebang, mikitinay tusa a subal, sawaliyan atu satipan. cacay subal izaw tulu a cu, cacay a cu izaw lima a cebang, cacay cebang namakay Canada, u zama sa namakay Amilika. kya madademec "Amilika syubay kanas-mali nisakaput sasasedsed, acasa "Amilika kanas nisakaput sasasedsed", sapuyu'en "Amilika syubay kanas", acasa kakelul han NBA.
S.PHON: giannis ant…ôtokounmpo nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i atńß…ôns, gr…ô…ô ¶…ô, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput, pańßanńßanan tu kawaw(pańßanńßanan tu kawaw **) ajza. giannis ant…ôtokounmpo i **** a mińß ¶aan nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka ¶a ¶aj ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ **, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu mir~…ĺwauk…ô…ô bu ¶ks putiput. ** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶aan, giannis ant…ôtokounmpo, miunduaj. nba kanatar~…ĺ kanas-mar~…ĺi putiput, amir~…ĺika: nationar~…ĺ bask…ôtbar~…ĺr~…ĺ asso ¶iation, sapuju Ē~ °…ôn nba, u amis-amir~…ĺika tatama sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi putiput. izaw ** a mar~…ĺi ¶…ôbaŇč, mikitinaj tusa a subar~…ĺ, sawar~…ĺijan atu satipan. ¶a ¶aj subar~…ĺ izaw tur~…ĺu a ¶u, ¶a ¶aj a ¶u izaw r~…ĺima a ¶…ôbaŇč, ¶a ¶aj ¶…ôbaŇč namakaj ¶anada, u zama sa namakaj amir~…ĺika. kja madad…ôm…ô ¶ "amir~…ĺika sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi nisakaput sasas…ôds…ôd, a ¶asa "amir~…ĺika kanas nisakaput sasas…ôds…ôd", sapuju Ē~ °…ôn "amir~…ĺika sjubaj kanas", a ¶asa kak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßan nba.
